name: com.promptibus/mcp
title: Promptibus MCP
description: Model intelligence for AI agents — syntax, params, pricing for 67+ generative AI models.

environmentVariables.name: PROMPTIBUS_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional API key for higher rate limits and expanded model coverage. Works anonymously without one.

environmentVariables.name: PROMPTIBUS_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override API base URL. Defaults to https://promptibus.com. Useful for testing.
